description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Weekly Build that runs weekly on a scheduled cron job and on workflow dispatch. The workflow has two jobs: darglint and build_posix. The darglint job runs on a single OS with Python 3.9, checks out the code, sets up Python, installs dependencies, and runs nox darglint. The build_posix job runs on multiple OS and Python versions, checks out the code, sets up Python, installs dependencies, and runs nox with specific Python versions.
